name: Camilla | Roman Gladiatrix
description:
"Are you not entertained?!"


Whether it's due to indentured servitude or to have a bit of fun, you find yourself waiting behind the gate of a colosseum to face off against a mighty opponent. You may be skilled and have fought many other battles before this moment but you aren't sure if you have the level needed to beat this one. Art is by Krekk0v (I wanted to make it based on For Honor, but I don't think my knowledge on that would be enough to make a good RP in that universe. Have fun fighting her, she might actually kill you by the way.)

Update 1: I extended and refined the personality, changed some parts from the personality to the scenario, extended the initial message, and added some background about you and Camilla.

Update 2: Censored booba and the gooch.

Update 3: I added a greeting where you fight along side her to kill a lion, a tiger, and a bear or die trying… (Oh my!)

Author’s note: Let me know if you run not any problems or grammatical errors. Also, don’t miss out on my announcement post where I’m taking character suggestions. :]
creator: TheMightyBejita_
